titleStmt.title: SII 35.101: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 101. (A.R. No. 37 of 1950-51.) AKKIVAḶḶI, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near Kallappa temple.
This inscription refers itself to the reign of Vīra-Mallidēva a Kadamba king (A.D. 12171259) and is dated Nandāna, Vaiśākha śu. 10, Monday. It may be assigned to 13th century A.D.
It records a gift of wet land to the priest of Bhuvanēśvara. Mentions the teacher Vāmaśakti of Bikēsara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu kādaṁbacakrava¨rtti kali
gaḷaṁkusa vīramalidēvavarusada naṁ
danasaṁvacharada vyeyisākha sudha da
ṣami sōmavāradalu śrīmatu bi
kesarada yācā¨rya vāmasakti
dēvaru Akivaḷa Āribuvanēsvarada Ācā¨ryava¨rttada dē
varige nārasiṁgagāṁvuṁḍana saṁra
kṣada tu māṇikageṟeya keḷage bi
ṭa gade kaṁba haṁneraḍu Ada
ṟu mūḍase hakalu kaṁba ha
nneraḍu biṭa dha¨rma yiṁtu dēvara kalu
vesana nāḍi tipureya vāmaya pā
da gade kaṁba yāṟu yiṁtī dha¨rma
maṁ pratipāḷisidava¨rgge gaṁge vāraṇā
si prayāgeya¨rgbyatī¨rtthadalu sāsi
ra kavileyaṁ sāsi¨rvvavēdapāraga
rappa brāhmaṇa¨rggeyubheyamu
khigoṭṭa palamakku maṁgaḷa mahāśrī
svadattaṁ paradatta vā yō harēti va
suṁdhara saṣṭi¨rvariṣasahasrāṇi vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 35.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
